about_quotes.speaker: Wayne Andre
about_quotes.evidence: So that's when we decided, I started to do a lot of writing, Dick Lieb and myself, of just standard tunes.
about_quotes.doc_title: Wayne Andre interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 7, 2002

about_quotes.speaker: John Pizzarelli, Jr.
about_quotes.evidence: We made two records, made a bunch of records, and when you’re at RCA... Dick Lieb did the arrangements.
about_quotes.doc_title: John Pizzarelli, Jr. interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 29, 2000 [interview 1 of 2]
